A highly detailed cinematic digital artwork of a mysterious ninja warrior in dynamic action pose, kneeling on one knee in the foreground. He wears sleek black traditional Japanese robes with intricate gold dragon embroidery, a black hood and face mask covering most of his face, revealing only intense, piercing eyes. He wields two katanas — one long blade drawn and held in a powerful two-handed grip, the other sheathed at his side. Flowing red silk ribbons swirl dramatically around him.
Behind and above the ninja looms an enormous, majestic black Eastern dragon with glossy obsidian scales, glowing red eyes, sharp horns, and fierce open jaws. The dragon's massive serpentine body coils through the scene, dominating the composition.
The background features a dramatic blood-red and fiery orange sunset sky with a massive glowing sun/moon. A traditional multi-tiered Japanese pagoda stands silhouetted on the left. Red maple leaves and vibrant red peony flowers are scattered throughout, with floating pearls and black water reflections in the foreground. Two dark birds fly in the upper left sky.
Epic fantasy style, ultra-detailed, dramatic volumetric lighting, rich red and black color palette with golden accents, cinematic atmosphere, highly intricate textures, 8k resolution, masterpiece quality.

images.alt: The visual is a surreal, disorienting scene set inside a sterile, all-white spacecraft corridor reminiscent of 2001, but lit with the fuzzy, hazy glow of a David Lynch dreamscape. The white walls seem to stretch on forever, but the corners are obscured by heavy, unnatural shadows that almost look like they're breathing. I am floating horizontally in mid-air, weightless, wearing a retro-futuristic white space suit with oversized, bulbous joints. My helmet is visor-less, revealing my face which is pale and expressionless, looking vacantly into the middle distance. My black and white hair is floating upwards as if underwater. In the background, a distorted, flickering monitor on the wall displays static that slowly morphs into a grinning face. The lighting is soft and diffuse, casting no sharp shadows, yet the darkness at the edges of the frame feels heavy and oppressive. The vibe is eerie, isolating, and psychosexual—like a beautiful nightmare where you're lost in space and something is watching you.

    [PREVIOUSLY USED]
    ⚠️💨# | "Trend Strength Rating"
    ⚠️🌀💨 | "Trend Strength Rating" (see above)
    ⚠️🌀 CAT. # | [same; "CAT." = Category, like hurricane]
    💬# | 10min Post Count
    🆎# | 10min Word Count
    🙂# | 10min Emoji Count

今日はカクテルの日（5月13日 記念日）( ‪꜆'ヮ')꜆🍸.*

1806年アメリカ・ニューヨークの週刊新聞『バランス・アンド・コロンビア・リポジトリ』に「カクテル」という名称が初めて登場した。

その翌週の5月13日号に、読者からの問い合わせに対して「カクテルの定義」が初めて文書化された。
これを記念してアメリカでは5月13日が「カクテルの日」（World Cocktail Day）として広く知られている。
